kelsey-brandt.position: centered in all three sub-panels, waist-up framing, body square to camera, identical camera in every sub-panel

pose.overall: standing facing camera performing a deliberate single-arm flex test — identical stance all three stages, only musculature and fabric tension change
pose.left_arm: bent in a classic bicep flex at shoulder height, fist toward her own ear
pose.right_arm: at her side, hand loosely curled
pose.hands: exactly two hands: left fist in the flex, right hand loose at her side — they touch nothing

kelsey-brandt.expression: stage 1: playful concentration, lip bitten; stage 2: laughing out loud as the flex pops; stage 3: radiant confident smirk straight into camera

spatial_rules: exactly one person in the image
exactly two hands total: her flexed left fist and her loose right hand
three equal vertical sub-panels, same camera, same distance, same lighting — time passes left to right

stage 1: athletic arm rising into the flex, uniform taut; stage 2: shoulders capping and broadening, sleeve-bands and waistband straining white at the seams yet holding; stage 3: fitness-cover physique — capped delts, carved abs read through the taut top, uniform at its absolute limit but intact — growth strictly monotonic, never reverting, FULLY covering in every stage
coverage of chest and hips fully intact in every stage
lighting: deepening sunset, warm-orange key from camera-left, identical across all three sub-panels
